title: Bolkesjø

infobox.value: This [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Bolkesj%C3%B8&action=edit).

is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located along the [Norwegian county road](/wiki/Norwegian_county_road "Norwegian county road") 37, about 18 kilometres (11 mi) to the northeast of the village of [Gransherad](/wiki/Gransherad_(village) "Gransherad (village)") and about 20 kilometres (12 mi) to the north of the [town of Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)"). The village is located along a small lake that is also named Bolkesjø. There are also hotels and resorts in the village. The mountain [Bletoppen](/wiki/Bletoppen "Bletoppen") lies about 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) to the northwest.[[2]](#cite_note-snl-2)

Thorsnæs, Geir, ed. (18 November 2021). ["Bolkesjø"](https://snl.no/Bolkesj%C3%B8). *[Store norske leksikon](/wiki/Store_norske_leksikon "Store norske leksikon")* (in Norwegian). [Kunnskapsforlaget](/wiki/Kunnskapsforlaget "Kunnskapsforlaget"). Retrieved 26 August 2023.

**Bolkesjø** is a village in [Notodden Municipality](/wiki/Notodden_Municipality "Notodden Municipality") in [Telemark](/wiki/Telemark "Telemark") county, [Norway](/wiki/Norway "Norway"). The village is located along the [Norwegian county road](/wiki/Norwegian_county_road "Norwegian county road") 37, about 18 kilometres (11 mi) to the northeast of the village of [Gransherad](/wiki/Gransherad_(village) "Gransherad (village)") and about 20 kilometres (12 mi) to the north of the [town of Notodden](/wiki/Notodden_(town) "Notodden (town)"). The village is located along a small lake that is also named Bolkesjø. There are also hotels and resorts in the village. The mountain [Bletoppen](/wiki/Bletoppen "Bletoppen") lies about 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) to the northwest.[[2]](#cite_note-snl-2)

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b0/No-nb_digibok_2014091028001_0199_1.jpg/250px-No-nb_digibok_2014091028001_0199_1.jpg)](/wiki/File:No-nb_digibok_2014091028001_0199_1.jpg)

Drawing of the village in 1837

The [1994 Progress Party national convention](/wiki/1994_Progress_Party_national_convention "1994 Progress Party national convention") took place at one of the hotels in Bolkesjø.
